text: The pristine orderliness of the glass-walled corridor gives way to the vibrant, intellectual energy of the R+D exhibit. Here, I feel a sense of anticipation—the sterile boundary I crossed is now behind me. Before me, the colorful display suggests an arena of experimentation and innovation. There is an undercurrent of curiosity in me, mixed with slight awe at humanity’s ceaseless drive to question, test, and reimagine. I feel both small and connected, standing on the edge between controlled structure and creative exploration.
